case_title: ABEYTA, SYBIL vs. MEISWICH, WAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABEYTA, SYBIL AS TO DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABEYTA, SYBIL COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE CARLOS LAROCHE MICHAEL ROSSOFF, ATTY FOR PLTF. DEFT NOT PRESENT. 10:15 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT. PWS&E SYBIL ABEYTA. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, FOR $3,000 TOTAL RENTS/DAMAGES. PLTF. TO PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 379 COLLINGWOOD STREET, LOWER UNIT, SF CA 94114 $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MEISWICH, WAYNE HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
OPPOSITION DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABEYTA, SYBIL

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF NOV-08-1993, DENIED MOVING PARTY FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN. NOTE: ON/OR ABOUT 9/14/93, DEFT APPEARED W/ COUNSEL HOFFMAN, CT GRANTED DEFT'S EXPARTE MOTION FOR STAY FOR 1 WEEK; DEFT FAILED TO COMPLY W/ TERMS OF STAY & EVICTION PROCEEDED ON 9/15/93. MORE THAN A MONTH LATER 10/19/93 DEFT THRU COUNSEL HOFFMAN FILED MOTION.
